translations.#### **套用 Visitor Pattern 的架構圖如下：**\n\n: #### **The architecture diagram applying the Visitor Pattern is as follows:**
translations.#### **首先定義出 Visitor 介面，此介面用途是抽象宣告出操作器能接: #### **First, define the Visitor interface. This interface abstracts the types of DataSource that the visitor can accept:**
translations.- Hard to test: It is difficult to test:
- Hard to test: It is difficult to verify which Type corresponds to which logic output.

- Difficult to extend and maintain: Whenever a new Type needs to be added, this ViewController must be modified; cellForRow, heightForRow, willDisplay... are spread across multiple functions, making it easy to forget or make mistakes during updates.

- Hard to read: All logic resides within the View itself
translations.- Testing: Complies with the Single Resp:
- Testing: Complies with the Single Responsibility Principle, allowing tests for each data item of every operator individually.

- Extensibility and Maintenance: When supporting a new DataSource (ViewObject), simply add a new method to the Visitor protocol and implement it in the respective Visitor operators. If a new operator needs to be separated, just create a new class to implement it.

- Reading: You only need to browse each operator object to understand the composition logic of each View on the entire page.
translations.- Type A: Event Feed\n\n- Type B: Tracki:
- Type A: Event Feed

- Type B: Tracking Recommendations

- Type C: New Song Feed

- Type D: New Album Updates

- Type E: New Follow-up Activity

- Type …. More

translations.以 StreetVoice 的動態牆為例：\n\n: Taking StreetVoice's dynamic wall as an example:
translations.使用 Visitor Pattern 增加 TableView 的閱讀和擴充性\: Using Visitor Pattern to Improve TableView Readability and Extensibility
translations.在沒有任何架構設計的情況下 Code 可能會長這樣：\n\n: Without any architectural design, the code might look like this:
translations.如上圖所示，動態牆是由多種不同類型的區塊動態組合而成：\n\n: As shown in the above image, the dynamic wall is composed of various types of blocks dynamically combined:
translations.我們有許多種類型的 DataSource (ViewObject) 需要與多種類: We have many types of DataSource (ViewObject) that need to interact with various types of operators, which is a typical example of [Visitor Double Dispatch](https://refactoringguru.cn/design-patterns/visitor-double-dispatch){:target="_blank"}.
translations.接上篇「 [Visitor Pattern in Swift](../ba577: Following the previous article "[Visitor Pattern in Swift](../ba5773a7bfea/)" which introduced the Visitor pattern and a simple practical use case, this article will present another real-world application in iOS development.
translations.擴充維護：當需要支援新的 DataSource (ViewObject) 時只需: Extensibility and Maintenance: When supporting a new DataSource (ViewObject), simply add a new method to the Visitor protocol and implement it in the respective Visitor operators. If a new operator needs to be separated, just create a new class to implement it.

translations.測試：符合單一職責原則，可針對每個操作器的每個資料單點進行測試\n: Testing: Complies with the Single Responsibility Principle, allowing tests for each data item of every operator individually
translations.為簡化 Demo Code 以下改用 `PlainTextFeedViewObj: To simplify the demo code, the design uses `PlainTextFeedViewObject` for plain text feeds, `MemoriesFeedViewObject` for daily memories, and `MediaFeedViewObject` for image feeds.
translations.當需要支援新的 DataSource (ViewObject) 時，只需在 Fe: When a new DataSource (ViewObject) needs to be supported, simply add a new method to the FeedVisitor interface and implement the corresponding logic in each operator.
translations.要開發一個動態牆功能，有多種不同類型的區塊需要動態組合顯示。\n\n: To develop a dynamic wall feature, multiple types of blocks need to be dynamically combined and displayed.
translations.閱讀：只需瀏覽各操作器物件即可知道整個頁面各個 View 的組成邏輯\n: Reading: You only need to browse each operator object to understand the composition logic of each View on the entire page.
translations.難以擴充維護：需要新增新 Type 時，都要更動此 ViewController: Difficult to extend and maintain: Whenever a new Type needs to be added, this ViewController must be modified; cellForRow, heightForRow, willDisplay... are scattered across multiple functions, making it easy to forget or make mistakes when updating.
translations.難以測試：什麼 Type 有什麼對應的邏輯輸出難以測試\n: Hard to test: It is difficult to test which Type corresponds to which logic output.
translations.難以閱讀：全部邏輯都在 View 身上\n: Hard to read: All logic is on the View itself
translations.類型可預期會在未來隨著功能迭代越來越多。\n\n: The types are expected to increase as features iterate in the future.
